title: Is rebuild a retcon
wikitext:
[]: Is rebuild a retcon?             Quote Post by Auriel » Mon Dec 18, 2006 4:55 pm Is rebuild a retcon of the original, and if it is: OH MY GODZ NOEEESS. I read somewhere that it would have a completely different plot or something. could someone clear this up for me?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Dec 18, 2006 5:02 pm It's not clear from the material so far released and translated quite how much will be new and changed as opposed to new and extra.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Mon Dec 18, 2006 5:14 pm If it blatantly contradicts the original series then it's not canon with it, just like the Manga is not canon with the Anime.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Dec 18, 2006 5:53 pm It's kind of vague at this point. One thing for certain is that it won't be canon, and it's not a direct remake. It is suposed to be an entirely new production. If it weren't for all of the artwork depicting the old characters, I would be inclined t say that we aren't even certain the original cast will be in the movies.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Sat Dec 23, 2006 4:19 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: One thing for certain is that it won't be canon,

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Dec 23, 2006 4:55 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: One thing for certain is that it won't be canon,

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Sun Dec 24, 2006 2:36 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: I refuse to see ReBuild as non-canon, as it is, after all, being directed by Anno. There's things that even didn't happen in the orginal due to the budget that will happen now.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 24, 2006 5:23 pm Millions Livio wrote: stupid optimistic bullshit

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Thu Dec 28, 2006 8:24 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: One thing for certain is that it won't be canon,

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Dec 29, 2006 1:26 am retcon? Recontinuation?? (guessing at what it could mean, never heard that term before.)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Dec 29, 2006 2:16 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: retcon? Recontinuation?? (guessing at what it could mean, never heard that term before.)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Dec 29, 2006 3:52 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: retcon?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Dec 29, 2006 11:50 am Mr. Tines wrote: [To a lesser extent, what was done to the Asuka/Shinji relationship between On Air and Video releases.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Dec 29, 2006 11:57 am AchtungAffen wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: [To a lesser extent, what was done to the Asuka/Shinji relationship between On Air and Video releases.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 29, 2006 3:33 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Phew! I can't believe I did that just to kill time. => You won't even hold me.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Dec 29, 2006 3:46 pm Reichu wrote: As if there is never, EVER a discrepancy between what people say and people think.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 29, 2006 4:13 pm I would say that, in this particular case, they are simply providing additional information rather than actually changing anything. It sheds light on Asuka's motivations, whereas the audience was given somewhat less limited reign beforehand.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 31, 2006 5:06 pm Reichu wrote: I would say that, in this particular case, they are simply providing additional information rather than actually changing anything. It sheds light on Asuka's motivations, whereas the audience was given somewhat less limited reign beforehand.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Dec 31, 2006 5:12 pm It means going back and changing something. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Retroactive_continuity

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 31, 2006 5:37 pm But I thought this wasn't a remake, so how could anything go back and be changed?? I get the feeling that even though it supposedly won't be a continiution, it happens within the same time-line (is canon) with the series and EoE. *shrugs*

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Dec 18, 2006 5:02 pm It's not clear from the material so far releas
